title: Moderation Update - Abuse Queue Triage
body:
The abuse queue has been triaged and moderation actions executed. Summary:

- Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for posting phishing links in 6 channels within 20 minutes (report_001)
- Warned user 'toxic_runner' for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers (report_002)
- Dismissed report on 'core_maintainer' as false positive (trusted member)
- Other reports (medium/low severity) remain open for further review

All high-severity spam and harassment cases have been addressed.
